reason: 修復用戶回報的 UX/UI 問題
changes_made: Fixed login page vertical text arrangement - changed from vertical (writing-mode) to horizontal text layout for proper input field usability
Removed excessive inline style attributes that were causing text layout issues
Fixed homepage 'Learn More' button - changed from incorrect GitHub link to proper /guide page
Updated link to use Next.js router.push instead of window.open for better UX

reason: Code review 發現並修復 CSS 直式文字根本原因
contributions: Deep CSS analysis via code-reviewer agent
changes_made: Identified root cause: Overly aggressive CSS override rules in globals.css (lines 119-132)
Removed problematic universal CSS selectors: *, *::before, *::after with writing-mode !important
Cleaned up html element writing-mode forcing in globals.css
Removed all inline style attributes from login page component
Restored clean Tailwind CSS class-based styling approach
Verified no remaining vertical-text CSS properties in production
Successfully deployed fix to production (40s deployment time)
Text layout now properly horizontal (left-to-right) for user input
next_steps: Monitor production environment for any remaining CSS issues
Consider establishing clearer CSS styling strategy

reason: 針對持續性垂直文字問題的最終 CSS 強制修復
contributions: Added strong CSS overrides to force horizontal text layout
Targeted Tailwind CSS v4 @supports conditional rules
Global CSS implementation for all elements
changes_made: Added writing-mode: horizontal-tb !important to html element
Added text-orientation: mixed !important to ensure proper text orientation
Added global CSS overrides for all elements (*, *::before, *::after)
Targeted the root cause: Tailwind CSS v4 browser-specific conditional rules
Pushed changes to GitHub for Vercel automatic deployment
Awaiting production verification
